v1_scope_note: Consumer-side demand signal currently exists only for the neurotoxin vertical (Google Trends across Botox/Daxxify/Belotero). Other verticals render with supply-only encoding until consumer signal coverage expands.

field_definitions.total_locations_in_dma: Count of rows in public.locations with dma_code = X. Includes locations regardless of enrichment status.
field_definitions.enriched_locations_in_dma: Subset of total_locations_in_dma whose brand_profiles array is non-empty.
field_definitions.injectable_supply_count: Subset of total_locations_in_dma where any brand_profiles[].category == 'Injectable'. This is the canonical 'supply' input to the white_space_score.
field_definitions.neurotox_supply_count: Subset of total_locations_in_dma where any brand_profile matches one of the six neurotoxin brand IDs (botox, dysport, xeomin, jeuveau, daxxify, letybo) via brand_id / brand_name / brand. Mirrors the inclusion rule in dashboard/scripts/export-vatico-market-map.mjs::extractNeurotoxProfiles().
field_definitions.practice_supply_count: Backward-compat alias of injectable_supply_count. Kept so existing downstream patches and renderers that read this field continue to work.
field_definitions.consumer_demand_proxy: Google Trends DMA index averaged across available neurotoxin keywords; each keyword is min-max normalized by its own observed max.
field_definitions.supply_z: z-score of log10(1 + injectable_supply_count) computed over the *eligible* DMA universe only (coverage_band in {high, medium}). Null for ineligible DMAs.
field_definitions.demand_z: z-score of consumer_demand_proxy over the same eligible universe. Null for ineligible DMAs.
field_definitions.white_space_score: demand_z - supply_z, bounded to [-3, +3]. Positive = under-served. Null for DMAs where coverage_band is 'low' or 'insufficient' — the underlying counts are too sparse to support a defensible score.
field_definitions.data_completeness_score: enriched_locations_in_dma / total_locations_in_dma. 0..1. Render as a confidence badge in the front-end.
field_definitions.coverage_band: One of {high (>=50 total locations), medium (>=15), low (>=5), insufficient (<5)}. See docs/dma-whitespace-audit-2026-04.md §2.
field_definitions.low_confidence: True iff coverage_band == 'low'. Renderer should dim or annotate these rows even though they receive a numeric supply count.
field_definitions.whitespace_eligible: True iff coverage_band in {high, medium}. Renderers MUST restrict the whitespace leaderboard to eligible DMAs.
field_definitions.has_supply_data: True iff injectable_supply_count > 0. Kept for backward compat; DO NOT use this as the sole filter — many high-coverage DMAs with real but small supply will pass, while insufficient-coverage DMAs with 0 will fail (correct outcome). Use whitespace_eligible for leaderboard inclusion.
field_definitions.has_demand_data: True iff a Trends DMA signal was matched for this DMA.
